hero.title: Condominium management, simplified.
hero.subtitle: Payments, debts, issues, announcements and reports in one platform.

items.excel: Multiple Excel files for each building or administrator.
items.chaos: Call and message chaos around debts and issues.
items.transparency: Lack of transparency for committee and residents.
items.timeWaste: Time lost with manual calculations and unclear situations.

solution.title: Espace Condo solution
solution.text: A modern SaaS platform for condominium associations in Moldova, with digital workflows for administration, collections, communication and reporting.

terms.title: Espace SaaS Terms
terms.intro: This page summarizes the general framework for using the Espace platform for associations, administrators, teams and residents.
terms.body: By using Espace, you agree to use the platform responsibly, in line with applicable law, the contractual terms agreed with the platform operator and your organization's internal rules. For the complete contractual version of the terms, rely on the legal and commercial documents approved for your Espace account.

privacy.title: Espace SaaS Privacy
privacy.intro: Espace processes account data and operational data to provide association management, invoices, payments, requests, communication and role-based access.
privacy.body: Data is used only for the functionality required by the platform, with organization-level separation and role-based access controls. For full details about retention, data subject rights and support channels, use the legal documentation published by Espace for your environment.

meta.homeTitle: Espace SaaS — Modern platform for condominium management
meta.homeDescription: Espace helps HOA admins manage residents, apartments, meters, invoices, payments, requests and communication in one place.
meta.homeOgDescription: Modern HOA administration for residents, apartments, meters, invoices, payments, requests and communication.

footer.text: Espace SaaS for condominium and association management.

home.title: Modern platform for condominium administration
home.text: Espace helps HOA admins manage residents, apartments, meters, invoices, payments, requests and communication in one place.
home.footnote: Built for real operational workflows: records, billing, balances, readings and communication.
home.modulesTitle: Core workflows in a clear system.
home.modulesText: The cards below describe product capabilities using real operational flows, without invented statistics.
home.rolesTitle: Superadmin, Administrator and Resident in the same platform.
home.moldovaTitle: Designed for how HOAs and condominiums are actually operated.
home.moldovaText: Espace organizes day-to-day activity for associations that work with buildings, staircases, apartments, monthly invoices, meters and constant resident communication.

moduleCards.title: Residents and apartments
moduleCards.text: Clear records for buildings, staircases, apartments, owners and residents.

moduleCards.title: Invoices and balances
moduleCards.text: Monthly flow for drafts, invoice publishing, balances and financial history.

moduleCards.title: Meters and readings
moduleCards.text: Meters, monthly readings and checks before billing.

moduleCards.title: Resident requests
moduleCards.text: Requests tracked clearly, with statuses and responses from the administration.

moduleCards.title: Documents and announcements
moduleCards.text: Communications, notice board and key documents for the association.

moduleCards.title: Espace Connect
moduleCards.text: Conversations linked to an apartment, invoice, meter, payment or request.

roles.title: Espace Superadmin
roles.text: Handles HOAs, onboarding, contracts and client status.

roles.title: HOA Administrator
roles.text: Manages buildings, residents, invoices, payments, meters and requests.

roles.title: Resident
roles.text: Sees invoices, balance, payments, readings and can send requests.

items.title: Tariffs
items.text: Clear rules for services and monthly calculation.

items.title: Monthly billing
items.text: Draft, review, lock and final invoices.

items.title: Reconciliation
items.text: Ready for payment matching and review.

pricing.title: Plans for small and large associations.
pricing.text: Pricing is discussed based on association size and required modules.

platform.title: The Espace platform
platform.text: A SaaS system for HOA administration: Superadmin manages clients and subscriptions, Admin/Staff operate the association and Resident uses the portal.

cards.title: Superadmin
cards.text: SaaS plans, subscriptions, client requests, monitoring and support.

cards.title: Admin/Staff
cards.text: Apartments, residents, tariffs, invoices, payments, meters and reports.

cards.title: Resident
cards.text: Invoices, payments, meters, notice board, requests and profile.

admins.title: For HOA administrators
admins.text: Espace helps administrators work in an organized way, with checks before billing and a clear monthly workflow.

residents.title: For residents
residents.text: A simple, clear portal that works well on mobile.
residents.footnote: Ask your administrator to activate access in Espace.

contact.accessText: Send your contact details and we will discuss the steps to activate your association in Espace.
contact.contactText: For associations interested in activation, complete the form and we will contact you with the next steps.
contact.assistedImplementation: Implementation is guided so the association data is configured correctly from day one.

features.title: Espace features
features.text: Available modules and components that are still in progress.

security.title: Security and control
security.text: Espace separates roles, limits access and keeps audit history for important actions.

cards.title: Role-based access
cards.text: Admin, Staff, Resident and Superadmin have separate surfaces.

cards.title: Audit
cards.text: Sensitive actions can be traced in history.

cards.title: Organized data
cards.text: Association data is handled in a controlled way, without automatic destructive cleanup.
